overall.description: A first-person exploration through a gothic castle interior from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring tapestry-lined corridors, grand wooden staircases, and the Charms Classroom. The player walks through halls, ascends stairs, explores a classroom filled with magical instruments, and emerges into a grand hall with a magical glass dome ceiling.

events.description: entering the long corridor lined with large tapestries from the columned hall
turning right toward the grand staircase at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the castle corridor admiring the tapestries and gothic architecture

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking away down the corridor ahead

entered.detail: tall wall hangings depicting medieval figures in blue and gold tones
dark stone pillars with carved capitals supporting the ceiling
geometric tile patterns in grey and white marble
gothic pointed arch doorways with heavy wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand columned hall before transitioning into a long corridor lined with large historical tapestries. The camera walks forward following a student in robes, passing ornate stone columns and patterned marble floors, then turns right toward a grand staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand wooden staircase with carved railings

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide wooden staircase with ornate railings
passing a tall gothic window with bright light streaming onto the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand wooden staircase with intricately carved banisters and newel posts

entered.detail: wide staircase with dark polished wood steps and ornate carved railings
intricately carved dark wood banisters with decorative spindles
tall pointed-arch windows letting in natural light on the landings

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand wooden staircase, leaving the tapestry corridor behind. The stairwell is enclosed with carved stone walls and periodic gothic windows that cast light onto the polished wooden steps. The architecture features ornate dark wood railings and decorative newel posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper landing with statue and classroom entrance

events.description: reaching the top landing of the staircase and entering the upper hall
text 'Charms Classroom' appears identifying the location near the statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the classroom entrance past a large bronze statue of a wizard holding a globe

notable_agents.action: student in robes walking past the camera toward the stairs
group of students standing near the classroom entrance

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a bearded wizard holding a crystal globe on a pedestal
dark wood panels with gold inscriptions covering the walls
heavy dark wood door with metal studs leading to the Charms Classroom

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens into an upper landing featuring a prominent bronze wizard statue holding a glowing globe. Students in robes mill about near the entrance to the Charms Classroom, which is marked by inscribed wooden wall panels and a heavy studded door.

scene_state.functional_zone: Charms Classroom with desks and magical instruments

events.description: entering the Charms Classroom through the heavy wooden door
turning to survey the classroom interior and professor's desk area
approaching the classroom exit door to leave

agents.ego_description: exploring the classroom interior, examining the professor's desk, astronomical instruments, and inscribed blackboards

notable_agents.action: professor in blue robes standing near the back of the classroom

entered.detail: large wooden desk cluttered with books, teacups, and magical artifacts
brass astronomical instrument with rotating rings on a stand
tall dark panels covered with chalk writing and diagrams
elaborate iron chandelier hanging from the beamed ceiling
rows of wooden desks and benches for students

segments.scene_description: Inside the Charms Classroom, the camera explores a room filled with magical educational equipment. The space features a professor's desk with an armillary sphere, tall windows, inscribed blackboards, and rows of student desks. A professor stands near the back as the camera pans around the room before heading toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with glass dome ceiling and magical energy

events.description: exiting the classroom and ascending to the grand hall with glass dome
magical purple energy swirls in the glass dome ceiling above

agents.ego_description: walking up the final staircase into the grand hall and looking up at the magical glass dome ceiling

notable_agents.action: student walking up the stairs ahead into the hall
students sitting at tables studying in the grand hall

entered.detail: large ornate glass and iron dome ceiling with blue and gold detailing
swirling purple magical energy concentrated in the center of the glass dome
intricate iron gothic arches supporting the glass dome
framed portraits hanging on the walls of the grand hall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the classroom, the camera ascends into a magnificent grand hall dominated by a huge glass dome ceiling with swirling purple magical energy. The space features ornate iron gothic architecture, portrait-lined walls, and students sitting at tables. The camera pans upward to reveal the magical phenomenon in the dome above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the stately corridors of a gothic castle into a magnificent hall crowned by a magical dome. It begins in a grand columned hall before gliding into a long corridor lined with historical tapestries, following a student across marble floors toward a grand staircase. As the camera ascends the polished wooden steps and passes carved stone walls, the scene opens onto an upper landing featuring a bronze wizard statue and the entrance to the Charms Classroom. The camera then moves inside to explore a room filled with armillary spheres and inscribed blackboards before exiting and ascending into a vast hall. Finally, the view pans upward to reveal a massive glass dome ceiling swirling with purple magical energy above ornate iron architecture and portrait-lined walls.
